title: Bosphorus Nights
query: Bosphorus Nights atmospheric Turkish lo-fi ambient music Istanbul night
summary: Web research for 'Bosphorus Nights' concept; used to anchor atmospheric texture, instrument palette, and mood for Anatolian Nights production prompts.
style_notes: Keep tracks vocal-first with Turkish lyrics; target 3-5 minute duration.
Each production should have a unique emotional anchor and never repeat the same title or hook.
All output must feel consistent with the 'Bosphorus Nights' playlist atmosphere.
Include water texture: Bosphorus waves, foghorns, distant seagull echoes.
Urban night texture: neon reflections, tram bells, distant traffic hum.
story_angles: fog rolling in from the Bosphorus
a solitary figure watching rain streak down a café window
the Bosphorus at 3am, ferry lights dissolving into fog
a neon sign reflected in a puddle on Istiklal Street
the last tram running through empty Galata streets

sources.title: Bosphorus Night Ferry — Lo-fi Hip-Hop for Istanbul Nights
sources.snippet: A love letter to Istanbul after dark, to the thousand-year tradition of Turkish classical modal music , and to the particular nocturnal romance of a city that sits across two continents.
